query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_comparisons (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  contractor_id INT NOT NULL,
  added_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_contractor (user_id, contractor_id)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_comparisons (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  contractor_id INT NOT NULL,
  added_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_contractor (user_id, contractor_id)
